name: hadrons-blessing
description: Source-backed Darktide entity resolution and build audit CLI.

scripts.test: node --test scripts/canonical-build.test.mjs scripts/extract-build.test.mjs scripts/reresolve-builds.test.mjs scripts/ground-truth.test.mjs scripts/cli-contract.test.mjs scripts/coverage.test.mjs scripts/inspect.test.mjs scripts/score-build.test.mjs scripts/export-bot-weapons.test.mjs scripts/tree-edges.test.mjs
scripts.audit:freeze: for f in tests/fixtures/ground-truth/audits/*.audit.json; do b=$(basename "$f" .audit.json); node scripts/audit-build-names.mjs "scripts/builds/${b}.json" > "$f"; done
scripts.check: npm run index:build && npm test && npm run index:check
